data.name: Informed Consent
data.label: ICF Signing
data.description: Process of obtaining participant's informed consent for study participation.

data.name: Screening Procedures
data.label: Screening
data.description: General set of procedures performed to determine participant eligibility for the study.

data.name: Admission to Clinical Research Unit
data.label: CRU Admission
data.description: Participant admission to the clinical research unit for inpatient study periods.

data.name: Discharge from Clinical Research Unit
data.label: CRU Discharge
data.description: Participant discharge from the clinical research unit after completion of inpatient procedures.

data.name: Outpatient Visit or Phone Call
data.label: Outpatient Follow-up
data.description: Follow-up contact with participants outside of inpatient periods, either in person or by phone.

data.name: Inclusion/Exclusion Criteria Assessment
data.label: Eligibility Assessment
data.description: Evaluation of participants against predefined inclusion and exclusion criteria.

data.name: Contraception Discussion and Documentation
data.label: Contraception Counseling
data.description: Discussion and documentation of contraception methods with participants.

data.name: Medical History and Demographics Collection
data.label: History & Demographics
data.description: Collection of participant's medical history, age, sex, race, and ethnicity.

data.name: Wilson Disease History Collection
data.label: WD History
data.description: Collection of specific historical information related to Wilson disease diagnosis and progression.

data.name: Prior Wilson Disease Treatment Collection
data.label: Prior WD Treatment
data.description: Collection of information regarding previous treatments for Wilson disease.

data.name: Physical Examination
data.label: Physical Exam
data.description: Assessment of cardiovascular, respiratory, gastrointestinal, and neurological systems; includes complete and symptom-driven exams.

data.name: Anthropometric Measurements
data.label: Height, Weight, BMI
data.description: Measurement of height, weight, and calculation of Body Mass Index (BMI).

data.name: Enrollment Confirmation
data.label: Enrollment
data.description: Confirmation of participant enrollment into the study.

data.name: Discontinuation of Chelation Therapy
data.label: Chelation Therapy Discontinuation
data.description: Cessation of prior chelation therapy for a specified period before study intervention.

data.name: Discontinuation of Zinc Therapy
data.label: Zinc Therapy Discontinuation
data.description: Cessation of prior zinc therapy for a specified period before study intervention.

data.name: Oral Administration of Study Intervention
data.label: Drug Administration
data.description: Administration of ALXN1840 orally with water, typically after an overnight fast.

data.name: Study Intervention Compliance Monitoring
data.label: Compliance Monitoring
data.description: Monitoring participant adherence to the study intervention administration schedule.

data.name: Blood Sampling for Pharmacokinetic (PK) and Pharmacodynamic (PD) Analysis
data.label: PK/PD Blood Draw
data.description: Collection of blood samples for analysis of plasma total molybdenum, plasma ultrafiltrate molybdenum, plasma total copper, plasma ultrafiltrate copper, labile bound copper, ceruloplasmin, and ceruloplasmin-bound copper.

data.name: Follicle-Stimulating Hormone (FSH) Test
data.label: FSH Test
data.description: Blood test to measure follicle-stimulating hormone levels, performed for post-menopausal females.

data.name: Alcohol Test
data.label: Alcohol Screen
data.description: Test to detect alcohol consumption.

data.name: Urine Drug Screen
data.label: Drug Screen
data.description: Urine test to detect illicit drug use.

data.name: HIV, Hepatitis B and C Screen
data.label: Infectious Disease Screen
data.description: Screening tests for Human Immunodeficiency Virus (HIV), Hepatitis B, and Hepatitis C.

data.name: Clinical Safety Laboratory Assessments
data.label: Safety Labs
data.description: Collection and analysis of samples for serum chemistry, hematology, coagulation, and urinalysis.

data.name: Urine and Serum Pregnancy Testing
data.label: Pregnancy Test
data.description: Tests to determine pregnancy status, performed using urine or serum samples.

data.name: Retained Serum Sample Collection
data.label: Retained Serum Sample
data.description: Collection of a 15 mL serum sample to be retained for evaluation in case of unexpected safety findings.

data.name: Vital Signs Measurement
data.label: Vital Signs
data.description: Measurement of body temperature, heart rate, respiratory rate, and systolic and diastolic blood pressure.

data.name: 12-Lead Electrocardiogram (ECG)
data.label: 12-Lead ECG
data.description: Recording of cardiac electrical activity using a 12-lead electrocardiogram, performed in triplicate.

data.name: Adverse Event Monitoring and Collection
data.label: AE Monitoring
data.description: Systematic monitoring, detection, collection, and follow-up of adverse events and serious adverse events.

data.name: Copper and Molybdenum Controlled Diet
data.label: Controlled Diet
data.description: Dietary intervention involving controlled intake of copper and molybdenum.

data.name: Light Exercise Regimen
data.label: Exercise Regimen
data.description: Participation in a light exercise regimen during inpatient periods.

data.name: Urination and Bowel Movement Monitoring
data.label: Excretion Monitoring
data.description: Monitoring and recording of urination and bowel movements.

data.name: Menstruation Checks
data.label: Menstruation Monitoring
data.description: Monitoring of menstruation status for female participants.

data.name: 24-Hour Urine Collection for Copper and Molybdenum
data.label: 24-Hour Urine Collection
data.description: Collection of all urine over a 24-hour period for measurement of copper and molybdenum content.

data.name: Fecal Sample Collection for Copper and Molybdenum
data.label: Fecal Sample Collection
data.description: Individual collection, weighing, and storage of fecal samples for measurement of copper and molybdenum content.

data.name: Concomitant Medication and Non-Pharmacologic Therapy/Procedure Assessment
data.label: Concomitant Therapy Assessment
data.description: Assessment and documentation of all concomitant medications, therapies, and procedures.

data.name: Liver Function Tests Monitoring
data.label: LFT Monitoring
data.description: Regular monitoring of liver function tests to detect potential adverse effects.

data.name: Complete Blood Count Monitoring
data.label: CBC Monitoring
data.description: Regular monitoring of complete blood count to detect potential adverse effects like anemia or leukopenia.

data.name: Neurologic Adverse Events Monitoring
data.label: Neurologic AE Monitoring
data.description: Regular monitoring for neurological adverse events.

data.name: Inductively Coupled Plasma Mass Spectrometry (ICP-MS) Analysis
data.label: ICP-MS Analysis
data.description: Laboratory analysis method used to determine copper and molybdenum concentrations in food, fluid, urine, and fecal samples.

data.name: Food and Fluid Sample Collection for Copper and Molybdenum
data.label: Food/Fluid Sample Collection
data.description: Collection of samples from meal and fluid batches for analysis of copper and molybdenum concentrations.

data.name: Water Sample Collection for Copper and Molybdenum
data.label: Water Sample Collection
data.description: Collection of water samples from the dispenser for analysis of copper and molybdenum content.

data.name: Manual Vital Signs Measurement
data.label: Manual Vital Signs
data.description: Assessment of vital signs using manual techniques when an automated device is unavailable.

data.name: Blood Draw
data.label: Venipuncture
data.description: General collection of blood samples, mentioned as a common procedure with associated risks.

data.name: Cannula
data.label: Cannula
data.description: Device that may be placed to minimize needle sticks for repeated blood draws.

data.name: Catheter
data.label: Catheter
data.description: Device that may be placed for venous access, not to be left in place for longer than 72 hours.

data.name: Automated Blood Pressure and Heart Rate Device
data.label: Automated BP/HR Device
data.description: Device used for consistent and reproducible assessment of blood pressure and heart rate.

data.name: Water Bottle Dispenser
data.label: Water Dispenser
data.description: Large dispenser from which participants drink water for controlled fluid intake.

data.name: SMS Text Messaging System
data.label: SMS System
data.description: System used by participants to confirm study intervention administration during the outpatient period.

data.name: Male Condom
data.label: Condom
data.description: Barrier contraception method required for male participants who are heterosexually active with a female partner of childbearing potential or a pregnant/breastfeeding partner.
